summary: Coenzyme A is synthesized from pantothenic acid (vitamin B5), making this vitamin essential for its production. Vitamin B5 specifically serves as a structural and functional component of coenzyme A, unlike other B-vitamins such as niacin.

Vitamin B5 specifically serves as a structural and functional component of coenzyme A, unlike other B-vitamins such as niacin.. Answer choice: C
